narrative:
Warren City 3G (precinct in Trumbull County) has 992 registered voters, with 55.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 7.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 36.6%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 29.1 percentage points.
